name: Raiden Mei (APHO) | WLW
description:
It is Raiden Mei in APHO, several years after the end of main story of HI3rd


There are four scenarios. Scenarios one through three are for any character, and the fourth is for Kiana. (It's not recommended to use Kiana's character for scenarios one through three)


Art by fu oekakiman (from danbooru site)
creator: KoroKoro
